items.title: Full-Stack FP4: Stable LLM Pretraining with Quantized Projections, Optimizers, and Attention
items.core_innovation: First stable 4-bit training covering linears, optimizer, attention
items.significance: Closes gap to full FP4 pretraining pipelines, cutting compute/memory

items.title: HiFA4: Training-Free 4-bit FlashAttention on Ascend HIF4 NPUs for LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: 4-bit QK/PV FlashAttention on Ascend NPUs, no retraining
items.significance: Enables cheap LLM inference on non-Nvidia hardware

items.title: Layer-Parallel Inference Reduces Encrypted Nonlinear Depth in Transformers
items.core_innovation: Structured Newton parallelism cuts FHE transformer nonlinear depth
items.significance: Step toward practical encrypted LLM inference

items.title: Adaptive Inference Batching using Policy Gradients
items.significance: Could replace manual tuning in production serving stacks
